title: Integrate learning-loop signal into Charlie memory + delegation
summary: Added learning-context packet fields and adaptive delegation mode weighting so Lead can shift between conservative/balanced/exploratory assignment based on recent operator learning outcomes.
changes: Extended MemoryPacket with learning_context metrics and delegation mode.
Computed learning trend and coaching guidance from recent learning answers.
Injected learning signal into prompt formatter for runtime decision context.
Adjusted delegation scoring by learning mode (conservative/balanced/exploratory).
Added deterministic verification script to validate learning-mode-driven delegation behavior.
Marked EXP-010f complete on task board.
risks: Exploratory mode can intentionally route work to lower-history workers; monitor quality gates and retry rates.
Current trend thresholds are heuristic and may need calibration with more learning samples.
rollback: Remove learning-mode weighting in lead-orchestrator and retain eval/profile-only scoring.
Keep learning page/APIs intact while reverting memory/delegation integration if needed.
